title: What if had killed
wikitext:
[]: What if ... had killed .... ?             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Mon Jun 22, 2009 5:24 pm 1) What if Misato had killed Ritsuko in the "Reiquarium" 2) Ritsuko had killed Gendou in EoE & saved herself. 3) Shinji had killed Toji in the Eva v Eva battle, with Shinji in control. 4) Shinji had killed Asuka at the end of EoE 5) Misato had killed Kaji, in a pact they made. 6) Rei II had killed the angel without having to self-destruct herself in Eva 00.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jun 22, 2009 5:30 pm It didn't happen so it doesn't matter.

[]: Re: What if ... had killed .... ?             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jun 22, 2009 5:31 pm Misato's toyboy wrote: 6) Rei II had killed the angel without having to self-destruct herself in Eva 00.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Mon Jun 22, 2009 6:06 pm NAveryW wrote: It didn't happen so it doesn't matter.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon Jun 22, 2009 6:35 pm print 'What if %s had killed %s ?' %(you, yourself)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 23, 2009 1:17 am Perfectly legit thread, given some of the topics discussed here, even if the responses are pretty much by defintion synopses of fanfics. @Dartz Python in my EGF? All the hip kids today are using Ruby -- the language out of Glorious Nippon.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jun 23, 2009 1:53 am 1) What if Misato had killed Ritsuko in the "Reiquarium" Ritsuko guts and Rei guts would mix and make a super bitch 2) Ritsuko had killed Gendou in EoE & saved herself. gendou would be sleeping in tang 3) Shinji had killed Toji in the Eva v Eva battle, with Shinji in control. Shinji would have emoed even more 4) Shinji had killed Asuka at the end of EoE He would think to himself "Man am I cool" 5) Misato had killed Kaji, in a pact they made. Misato and Kaji had a suicide pact like hilter and eva braun that would be pretty cool, but Misato would loose cool points for not holding up her end of the deal 6) Rei II had killed the angel without having to self-destruct herself in Eva 00. Then she would have lived.

[]: Re: What if ... had killed .... ?             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Jun 23, 2009 2:51 am 1) What if Misato had killed Ritsuko in the Reiquarium? Ritsuko never gets a chance to set up the firewall in EoE, which means that everyone except Shinji dies just a little bit faster. 2) Ritsuko had killed Gendou in EoE & saved herself. Everyone is killed by the JSSDF because Rei never becomes a god. 3) Shinji had killed Toji in the Eva v Eva battle, with Shinji in control. Shinji becomes even more mopey, Zeruel causes Third Impact. Everyone dies. 4) Shinji had killed Asuka at the end of EoE. Humanity dies out because no one else resurfaces, but that's not really a big change because no matter how much Shinji and Asuka go at it, they're not saving humanity either. 5) Misato had killed Kaji, in a pact they made. Misato is much less distressed by Kaji's death. No actual change to the story. 6) Rei II had killed the angel without having to self-destruct herself in Eva 00. Uh... well... uh... Probably Rei would still do the same stuff against Kaworu as per regular timeline and later Gendo would bring Eva-00 down to Terminal Dogma as well and get it involved with the merging going on. That or Gendo kills her and blows up Eva-00 and gets a fresh Rei clone because Ritsuko might not end up killing the spares in this scenario. No changes to the events either way. So basically, Option 2 is happiest for Earth, Option 3 is happiest for the Angels, and the main crew is pretty much screwed no matter what they do.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:09 am What if Muhammed Ali had killed Joe Frazier? If I recall correctly, Fifth Impact would have occurred.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:21 am chee wrote: What if Muhammed Ali had killed Joe Frazier?

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Tue Jun 23, 2009 10:13 am If Ali killed Frazier in the ring, then he'd be fine. If he beat the shit out of him outside of the ring and Frazier proceeded to die, then...no.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Tue Jun 23, 2009 10:43 am what if: 4) Shinji kills Asuka in the end of EoE answer: never watch Evangelion again, getting mad at Anno, hide in a corner and cry for 3 days while monotonely repeating: "NOOO! Asuka! NO! Why Asuka!? Why!?" 'nuff said...

[]: Re: What if ... had killed .... ?             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jun 23, 2009 1:02 pm Misato's toyboy wrote: 1) What if Misato had killed Ritsuko in the "Reiquarium" 2) Ritsuko had killed Gendou in EoE & saved herself. 3) Shinji had killed Toji in the Eva v Eva battle, with Shinji in control. 4) Shinji had killed Asuka at the end of EoE 5) Misato had killed Kaji, in a pact they made. 6) Rei II had killed the angel without having to self-destruct herself in Eva 00.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jun 23, 2009 1:10 pm What if Eva Unit 01 did not activate in times of need?

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Tue Jun 23, 2009 1:32 pm It didn't anyways

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 23, 2009 1:33 pm > 4) Shinji kills Asuka in the end of EoE It would have been exactly what she wanted . And the living would envy the dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Jun 23, 2009 6:10 pm 5) Misato had killed Kaji, in a pact they made.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Tue Jun 23, 2009 6:20 pm Mr. Tines wrote: > 4) Shinji kills Asuka in the end of EoE It would have been exactly what she wanted . And the living would envy the dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 23, 2009 6:35 pm Synapsid wrote: why did she stop Shinji from strangling her?

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Tue Jun 23, 2009 6:56 pm Except her entire reason for her "raison d etre" was now proven false, her entire source of her problems that lead to the way she was, was a lie. "I DON'T WANT TO DIE!!" I don't bite one bit that she had given up and wanted to die at the end after all this, and choosing to come back to the real world as well. Now her being ok with Shinji killing her, I could see it.... a sick and morbid acceptance that she had little left and if this was her fate.... At the same time I don't even believe that Asuka was even really "awake" at this point, she was not even looking at Shinji as he was strangling her, she was still staring straight in the zoned out look both had on return. The caress almost seemed like it was reflex or carry over from being in the instrumentality soup. We don't see her even look at her assaulter or so anything till hes a crying mess on top of her. Always make me wonder if she was even "awake" and aware at the time of the event. The whole thing is also shot down since the original line at the end was in the vein of "I won't be killed by the likes of you"... not the kind of words to come from someone wanting to die at Shinji's hands.
